description: An annotated reference plan exercising the one format end to end: plan-level `defaults` merged under each job, a `description`/`_comment` annotation, and an `agent` + a `command` job. `mode` is the single discriminator; friendly keys only (id/repo/mode + the per-mode field).

jobs._comment: repo comes from defaults; the prompt is bare — the engine injects the placeholder preamble at dispatch.
jobs.prompt: Do the work in this repository, heartbeating as you go.

jobs.description: arunner runs+watches this argv; doneness = exit code (heartbeat plumbing synthesized).
